content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 5, 1), (6, 9, 2), (7, 9, 2), (3, 8, 4), (4, 9, 6), (4, 5, 7), (5, 9, 9), (0, 8, 10), (1, 2, 20), (7, 8, 23), (1, 9, 25), (0, 4, 26), (1, 3, 27)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 9 exactly at time 25.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 25:

* Edge (2, 5, 1) has node 2 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 9, 2) has node 6 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 9, 2) has node 7 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 8, 4) has node 3 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 9, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 7) has node 4 and time 7. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 9, 9) has node 5 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 8, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 2, 20) has node 1 and time 20. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (7, 8, 23) has node 7 and time 23. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 9, 25) has node 1 and time 25. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 4, 26) has node 0 and time 26. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 3, 27) has node 1 and time 27. -> Add node 3.

The nodes matched are 5, 9, 8, 4, 9, 7, 20, 8, 23, 25, and 3.

Answer: [5, 9, 8, 4, 9, 7, 20, 8, 23, 25, 3]
